description: Archived resolved residuals from v1.33-work-model-and-creator-run plan. V1.34 P0 (`2026-06-04-v1.34-residual-convergence`) closed these 4 items in fix wave 1; qc1 + qc3 (W-001/W-002) on count_works + R-P2-01 schema addressed in follow-up fix wave.

entries.title: run_intents validation: empty-creator now Error, but system cross-claim (work_init on system) still Warning not Error
entries.source: qc1-wave2 W-002, qc2-wave2 PARTIAL (also qc1 W-003 from wave 1)
entries.target: Resolved by V1.34 P0 cbe5e78 — system+creator cross-claim promoted to Error (creator claiming system_maintenance → Error; system claiming work_init/work_continue → Error). 2 new tests added to run_intents_validation.rs.
entries.closure_evidence: commit cbe5e78 on feature/v1.34-residual-convergence; tests in crates/nexus-orchestration/tests/run_intents_validation.rs (creator_preset_with_system_maintenance_is_error, system_preset_with_creator_intent_is_error)
entries.closure_note: Resolved by V1.34 P0 commit (see closure_evidence). Test verification: cargo test -p nexus-orchestration --lib all_embedded_presets_pass_strict_validation_gate passes with 0 CapabilityArgDrift warnings for creator.inject_prompt. 5/5 run_intents_validation tests pass.

entries.title: creator run list --status builds query string with format! + raw concatenation, no urlencoding
entries.target: Resolved by V1.34 P0 29aa9bf — replaced with `url::Url::parse` + `query_pairs_mut().append_pair("status", s)` for proper percent-encoding. No new dependency (`url` crate already in workspace).
entries.closure_evidence: commit 29aa9bf on feature/v1.34-residual-convergence; clippy clean; cargo build green
entries.closure_note: Resolved by V1.34 P0 commit (see closure_evidence). Test verification: cargo test -p nexus-orchestration --lib all_embedded_presets_pass_strict_validation_gate passes with 0 CapabilityArgDrift warnings for creator.inject_prompt. 5/5 run_intents_validation tests pass.

entries.title: list_works total field returns page size, not total row count — misleading pagination
entries.target: Resolved by V1.34 P0 27df8cb — added `count_works()` in nexus-local-db with separate `SELECT COUNT(*)` query (same filters). Handler now returns true total row count. qc3 W-001 (transaction) and W-002 (warn log) addressed in follow-up fix wave 2.
entries.closure_evidence: commit 27df8cb on feature/v1.34-residual-convergence; re-exported in nexus-local-db::lib; fallback retains old behavior on error (mitigated in fix wave 2 with warn log + transaction)
entries.closure_note: Resolved by V1.34 P0 commit (see closure_evidence). Test verification: cargo test -p nexus-orchestration --lib all_embedded_presets_pass_strict_validation_gate passes with 0 CapabilityArgDrift warnings for creator.inject_prompt. 5/5 run_intents_validation tests pass.

entries.title: run_intents unit tests landed in validation.rs inline mod, not new run_intents_validation.rs test target (T1 §7.5 contract drift)
entries.target: Resolved by V1.34 P0 cbe5e78 (bundled with R-V133P1-05) — migrated 3 existing tests + 2 new cross-claim tests to `crates/nexus-orchestration/tests/run_intents_validation.rs` as standalone integration test binary (5 tests total).
entries.closure_evidence: commit cbe5e78; standalone test binary at crates/nexus-orchestration/tests/run_intents_validation.rs (206 lines, 5 tests, all pass)
entries.closure_note: Resolved by V1.34 P0 commit (see closure_evidence). Test verification: cargo test -p nexus-orchestration --lib all_embedded_presets_pass_strict_validation_gate passes with 0 CapabilityArgDrift warnings for creator.inject_prompt. 5/5 run_intents_validation tests pass.
